mapper.sql: c.CAT_SN, c.CAT_PARENT_SN, c.CAT_DOMAIN_CD, c.CAT_APRV_METHOD_CD, c.CAT_NM, c.CAT_PRF_YN, c.CAT_SORT_NO, c.CAT_USE_YN
mapper.select: SELECT FROM CATEGORY c JOIN CMM_CODE domain_code ON domain_code.CMM_CD = c.CAT_DOMAIN_CD AND domain_code.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN CMM_CODE domain_group ON domain_group.CMM_SN = domain_code.CMM_PARENT_SN AND domain_group.CMM_CD = 'CATG01' AND domain_group.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN CMM_CODE approval_code ON approval_code.CMM_CD = c.CAT_APRV_METHOD_CD AND approval_code.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN CMM_CODE approval_group ON approval_group.CMM_SN = approval_code.CMM_PARENT_SN AND approval_group.CMM_CD = 'CATG02' AND approval_group.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE c.CAT_SN = #{categorySn} AND c.CAT_DOMAIN_CD = #{domainCode} AND c.CAT_USE_YN = 'Y' AND c.CAT_PARENT_SN IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM CATEGORY c JOIN CMM_CODE domain_code ON domain_code.CMM_CD = c.CAT_DOMAIN_CD AND domain_code.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN CMM_CODE domain_group ON domain_group.CMM_SN = domain_code.CMM_PARENT_SN AND domain_group.CMM_CD = 'CATG01' AND domain_group.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN CMM_CODE approval_code ON approval_code.CMM_CD = c.CAT_APRV_METHOD_CD AND approval_code.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN CMM_CODE approval_group ON approval_group.CMM_SN = approval_code.CMM_PARENT_SN AND approval_group.CMM_CD = 'CATG02' AND approval_group.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE c.CAT_DOMAIN_CD = #{domainCode} AND c.CAT_USE_YN = 'Y' AND c.CAT_PARENT_SN IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.CAT_SORT_NO, c.CAT_SN
SELECT FROM CATEGORY c WHERE c.CAT_DOMAIN_CD = #{domainCode} AND c.CAT_PARENT_SN IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.CAT_SORT_NO, c.CAT_SN
SELECT FROM CATEGORY c WHERE c.CAT_DOMAIN_CD = #{domainCode} AND c.CAT_PARENT_SN IS NULL AND c.CAT_USE_YN = 'Y' LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
